index.description: Increase top-of-funnel or move users along the funnel. Output is a measurable funnel improvement. SEO campaigns, paid ads, content cadence, launch campaigns, PR pushes, referral programs, retention drips.

playbook.summary: Solo dev with shipped MVP grinds to ramen-profitable ($4K MRR / quit-day-job threshold) without VC.
Engaged audience → paying signups in a single-day sprint.

"One publish-ready post. AI does the volume, human adds: original POV, real example, internal links, structured data, EEAT signals. Output ranks in 3-6 weeks and does NOT trigger 'AI slop' detection."
Shipped MVP at $0 MRR → ramen-profitable $4K MRR / quit-day-job threshold without VC.
Zero audience → 5K followers on X plus 1K newsletter subscribers in 26 weeks.
Compound an owned audience (Twitter/X + newsletter) from zero to a 5K-follower / 1K-subscriber base that can be activated for every future product launch.
Run a sustainable single-source content cadence — one weekly action that fans out to X, IH, newsletter — without burning out on a nomad schedule.
Empty inbox → 10 personalised cold DMs sent and logged with status by EOD.
An inbound or warm-intro lead message arrives. Done = within 24h, either a qualifying reply with a calendar link, or a polite decline-and-refer.
An inbound or warm-intro lead message arrives. Done = within 24h, either a qualifying reply with a calendar link, or a polite decline-and-refer.
From first outbound touch on Upwork/LinkedIn to a counter-signed SOW with deposit landing in escrow; pipeline of 3-5 qualified leads in parallel, one close per cycle.
From first outbound touch on Upwork/LinkedIn to a counter-signed SOW with deposit landing in escrow; pipeline of 3-5 qualified leads in parallel, one close per cycle.

"Stand up a multi-channel content engine: editorial strategy, distribution stack, AI- assisted production pipeline with quality guardrails, repeatable measurement loop. 'Done' = monthly output of 4..."
"Cold inbound enquiry to signed Statement-of-Work + deposit invoiced OR graceful decline that protects the agency's positioning."

"Inbound lead to signed retainer (4–6 weeks) — A cold inbound enquiry leaves the funnel either as a signed Statement-of-Work with deposit invoiced, or as a graceful 'not a fit' note that protects th..."

From a cold inbound DM/email to a countersigned monthly retainer with first invoice paid, run a deterministic pipeline that filters bad-fit clients early, prices the engagement defensively, and loc...

Inbound-to-signed-retainer in one client cycle — From a cold inbound DM/email to a countersigned monthly retainer with first invoice paid, run a deterministic pipeline that filters bad-fit clients ...
Two weeks of work → long-form IH post that drives qualified clicks back.

"Coordinate a flagship launch across product, engineering, design, marketing, sales, and support: from a launch tier decision through pre-launch readiness, day-zero execution, and a 30-day post-laun..."
Multi-platform launch chaos → sequenced PH + HN + IH + X + Reddit + Gumroad wave in one week.
Engineer a documented funnel that turns a 1K-subscriber free newsletter into ~200 paying customers at $20 average through low-friction email-driven conversion, hitting $4K MRR.
1K free newsletter readers → 200 paying customers at $20 average ($4K MRR).

"Full paid-acquisition cycle on one primary platform (Google or Meta) plus one retargeting layer. 'Done' = campaign hits target CAC for 14 consecutive days, attribution is wired through to activatio..."
Shipping product → top-3 Product Hunt launch with measurable signup and revenue lift.
Run a structured 4-week campaign that takes a shipping product to a top-3 Product Hunt launch, with measurable signup + revenue lift, then converts the spike into retained subscribers and audience.

"End-to-end launch campaign anchored on Product Hunt, with founder community presence (IH, HN, Reddit), email + SMM coordination, paid teaser layer, and post-launch retention follow-through. 'Done'..."
Qualified discovery call to scoped proposal + SOW + price, sent within one working day of decision.
From a qualified-yes discovery, produce a short proposal (1-3 pages) the client can sign within a week. Done = proposal sent, follow-up cadence scheduled, win/loss reason recorded.
"Build a system that compounds: every closed engagement produces a testimonial + a referral + a public artefact, so by day 90 inbound covers >=50% of new pipeline and outbound effort drops."
"Build a system that compounds: every closed engagement produces a testimonial + a referral + a public artefact, so by day 90 inbound covers >=50% of new pipeline and outbound effort drops."

"Pick one strategic topic, ship one pillar page + 8–12 cluster pages with internal-link mesh, on-page SEO, schema, and AI-overview adaptation. 'Done' = cluster is fully published, indexed, internall..."
One platform-native post that is not cross-poster slop. Hook tested, format suits the platform, CTA appropriate to stage, reply window scheduled.
One pillar + 8-15 supporting pages around a single high-intent topic, with internal- linking graph, author/expert credentials surfaced, and original data or interview content for E-E-A-T
Coordinate a single product release across PH/HN/Reddit/LinkedIn/X/email/paid in one shared timeline, with role/owner per surface and a post-mortem ledger
One canonical asset (long-form post, podcast episode, or webinar) gets distributed as 10+ derivative units across owned/earned/paid surfaces within one work cycle, with measurable reach per channel
"One indexed asset live each week (blog post, changelog, doc page): topic chosen against keyword + ICP, draft generated with AI then human-edited, on-page SEO complete, shared on 2 channels."
One post per week to reinforce agency niche + earn 1-2 inbound replies per post.
One post per week that reinforces specialization niche. Done = post published, engagement triaged, follow-up DMs handled within 48h.
One post per week that reinforces specialization niche. Done = post published, engagement triaged, follow-up DMs handled within 48h.
